{
  "claims": [
    "Geothermal energy is one of the cleanest and most reliable renewable resources.",
    "AB 1031 supports responsible energy development in California.",
    "AB 1031 helps position California for long-term energy reliability and economic growth.",
    "AB 1031 lowers burdensome fees imposed on geothermal energy developments by the Department of Toxic Substances Control (DTSC).",
    "AB 1031 aligns state law with federal policy while maintaining strong environmental safeguards and regulatory oversight.",
    "In regions like Imperial County, geothermal development and lithium recovery offer transformative potential.",
    "Expanding geothermal infrastructure can create family-supporting careers in construction, engineering, and maintenance.",
    "AB 1031 is a science-based policy that balances sustainability with opportunity."
